dsl_rule.translation_notes: Translated 'long bottom tail candle' using lower_wick > body ratio. 'Candle body located in top/upper end of range' approximated using body_pct > 0.5 (body in upper half) and close >= pivot (price above midpoint). Closing price above low confirms upward pullback from lows. Exit on bearish reversal (close < prev_close) since author provided no explicit exit condition.

backtest_rule.reason: Translated 'long bottom tail candle' using lower_wick > body ratio. 'Candle body located in top/upper end of range' approximated using body_pct > 0.5 (body in upper half) and close >= pivot (price above midpoint). Closing price above low confirms upward pullback from lows. Exit on bearish reversal (close < prev_close) since author provided no explicit exit condition.

source_rule_text: A long bottom tail candle, especially with a green body or even as a red candle/Doji, signals a bullish reversal when the candle body is positioned in the top/upper end of the range, indicating rejection of lower prices and buyer support.
